<!-- generated by session_final_report for vpic_kokkos/20260714_155730 at 2026-07-14 21:06 UTC -->

## Reproducing this session's runs manually

All paths below are relative to the session workspace: `$PROJECT_ROOT/workspaces/vpic_kokkos/20260714_155730`.

### 1. Environment

```bash
source tmp/env_tuolumne.sh
export CC=$(which mpicc)
export CXX=$(which mpic++)
```

### 2. Rebuild the annotated library + deck (after any source change)

```bash
cd build_ann && make -j32 vpic          # ~12s incremental; only touched .cc files recompile
cd ../dataset/validate8node_benchmark
../../install_ann/bin/vpic ../../annotated/source/sample/benchmark.cxx
```

### 3. Run scripts (require a flux allocation; pass the allocation id via `flux proxy <alloc> bash <script> <run_name>`)

| Script | What it runs |
|---|---|
| `tmp/smoke_run_weibel.sh` | 16-rank smoke test, `Weibel.cxx` deck |
| `tmp/best_case_full.sh` | 16-rank best-case trace used for the initial diagnosis |
| `tmp/validate_8node_benchmark.sh` | 128-rank/8-node `benchmark.cxx` run, baseline env (1 thread/rank) |
| `tmp/validate_8node_benchmark_omp.sh` | Same, with the OMP threading fix (`-c6`, `OMP_NUM_THREADS=6`, etc.) — **use this one going forward** |

Example:
```bash
flux proxy <alloc-id> bash tmp/validate_8node_benchmark_omp.sh my_run_name
```

### 4. Traces and results

- Traces: `traces/<run_name>/` (raw `.pfw.gz` per rank) and `traces/<run_name>/compact/` (post-`dftracer_split`).
- App output (field/particle/energy dumps): `dataset/<run_name>/` — only populated when `ENABLE_OUTPUT=1` in `benchmark.cxx` (currently set).
- Analysis: `mcp__dftracer__analyze` against the `compact/` dir with `analyzer_preset=posix`; read the console Time Period Summary directly rather than relying on `mcp__dftracer__diagnose` (known to return 0 observations against some checkpoints — see `bug-diagnoser-zero-observations-checkpoint` memory).

### 5. Applying the field-energy coalescing patch (not yet done — next session)

See `workload-vpic-kokkos` skill's "Optimization candidates" section for the exact call sites (`src/field_advance/standard/energy_f.cc`, `src/field_advance/field_advance.h`/`.cc`, `src/field_advance/standard/sfa.cc`/`sfa_private.h`) and the pattern already applied for the species-energy half (`src/species_advance/standard/energy_p.cc`'s `energy_p_local()`, `src/vpic/dump.cc`'s `dump_energies()`).
